sources.title: AI In Government And Public Services Market Report, 2033
sources.claim: Global AI in government market valued at USD 22.41B in 2024, projected to reach USD 98.13B by 2033 at CAGR 17.8%. Microsoft led with >13% market share; top 5 players held 34% collectively.

sources.title: Where does federal AI spending stand in 2026?
sources.claim: Federal AI contract potential values rose 1,605% to $90.7B in 2026 from 2024. Obligations grew 966% from $355M (2024) to $7.2B (2026). Agencies with AI contracts: 17 (2022) → 28 (2026).

sources.title: Palantir Q1 2026 Earnings Press Release (SEC Filing)
sources.publisher: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (Palantir Technologies)
sources.claim: Q1 2026 total revenue $1.63B (+85% YoY). U.S. government revenue $687M (+84% YoY). Full-year 2026 guidance raised to $7.65B (+71% YoY). 206 deals >$1M closed in Q1.

sources.title: Winning the Race: America's AI Action Plan
sources.claim: July 23 2025: Trump administration released formal AI Action Plan mandating federal deployment acceleration across citizen services, defence, and law enforcement. Revoked Biden EO 14110 safety requirements.

sources.title: Promoting Advanced Artificial Intelligence Innovation and Security — Executive Order, June 2026
sources.claim: June 2, 2026: Trump signed new EO establishing cybersecurity mandates and voluntary framework for frontier AI model deployment in critical federal systems.

sources.title: AI In Government And Public Services Market — Global Market Analysis Report 2036
sources.claim: Market valued at USD 26.4B in 2025, expected to reach USD 31.1B in 2026 and USD 160.0B by 2036 at 17.8% CAGR. Government agencies account for 65% of end-use segment.

sources.title: How Federal Contractors Can Position for $13.4B in Defense AI Spending
sources.claim: DoD requested $13.4B for AI and autonomy in FY2026, the largest single-year defence AI investment in U.S. history. Department of War represents 98.9% of total federal AI spend.

sources.title: 5 ways state and local governments will operationalise AI in 2026
sources.claim: In 2026, agencies moved beyond pilots to embed AI directly into real-world processes at scale. Orchestration platforms connecting compliance, fund movement, and cross-program coordination are the dominant deployment pattern.

sources.title: AI Use Cases in Government — Deloitte AI Dossier (Government & Public Services)
sources.claim: AI in government covers: fraud detection, citizen service automation, infrastructure planning, procurement analysis, and biosurveillance. Case studies for IRS ML fraud detection and public health AI deployments.

sources.title: Palantir (PLTR) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
sources.claim: Palantir closed 206 deals >$1M in Q1 2026. Raised full-year 2026 revenue guidance to $7.65-7.66B. U.S. commercial revenue +133% YoY. USDA $300M contract secured April 2026.

sources.title: The $92 Billion Federal AI Gold Rush
sources.claim: Detailed breakdown of $90.7B federal AI potential contract value in 2026. Civilian agency proposed IT budgets: VA $12.1B, HHS $9.4B, Treasury $6.2B.

sources.title: States Continue Efforts to Regulate AI in Healthcare: A Review of Legislation Passed in 2026
sources.claim: CA AB 489 (effective Jan 1, 2026), TX TRAIGA (Jan 1, 2026), CO AI Act (SB24-205, June 30, 2026) — state-level AI disclosure and oversight laws that apply to government AI systems as well as private sector.

data_confidence.market_size: HIGH — multiple independent analyst firms (Grand View, Future Market Insights, Insight Ace) converge on $26-31B for 2025-2026 at ~17-18% CAGR
data_confidence.growth_5y: HIGH — back-calculated from Grand View Research CAGR of 17.8% from a 2024 base of $22.41B to 2021 estimate of ~$13.7B = +127%
data_confidence.growth_3m: MEDIUM — represents Palantir U.S. government segment Q1 2026 YoY growth (+84%) as leading sector indicator; not a direct 3-month market metric
data_confidence.federal_contracts: HIGH — sourced from Brookings Institution analysis of official federal procurement data
data_confidence.competitor_shares: MEDIUM — Grand View Research 2024 estimates; Palantir, IBM, Salesforce specific shares are approximate based on revenue proportionality
data_confidence.palantir_financials: HIGH — sourced directly from SEC filing (Form 8-K)
